tahini-muffin-lezzet.name: Tahini Muffin
instructions: 1. A magnificent recipe that you will prepare with Tahin.
2. Beat the egg and dust sugar from a deep mixing container to be foamed.
3. Add sunflower oil, tahin, milk and vanilla.
4. blend with flour baking powder and add it to other mixture.
5. Share the dough into lubricated muffin molds.
6. Bake plenty of sesame and cook for about 25 minutes in the oven with a set of 180 degrees.
7. Leave to cool on the razor wire.
8. Serve.

tarator-with-walnuts-lezzet.name: Tarator With Walnuts
instructions: 1. Pull the walnuts in the kitchen robot.
2. Check the bread for the kitchen robot and filter the water by moistened with water.
3. Fine shore of garlic.
4. Mix Salça, bread, olive oil and vegetables in a bowl.
5. Add spices, olive oil and lemon juice and mix well.
6. Take the service plate and serve.

tarragon-chicken-recipe-comedera.name: Tarragon Chicken Recipe
tarragon-chicken-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de pollo al estragón fácil

ingredients.item: 4 highest chicken ((you can use boning thighs if you prefer more flavour))
1 cda de aceite de oliva ( virgen extra)
2  chalotas picadas ((puedes usar cebolla morada si no consigues))
1/2 taza de caldo de pollo natural  (preferiblemente sin sal)
3/4 taza de crema espesa o nata para cocinar
1 cda filled with minced fresh stragon (or 1 teaspoon dry)
1  toque de pimienta rosa  (para decorar y dar un sabor floral (opcional))

instructions: Seal them with salt and pepper. In a large frying pan, heats butter with olive oil with medium-high heat. Add the chicken and cover it both sides, about 4-5 minutes a side. Take it back and put it back onto a cover plate.
In the same frying pan, it reduces fire and adds minced seatshirts. Cooking for 2 minutes till transparent. Add the frosted garlic and cook 30 more seconds, without burning.
Fold up the white wine, scrape the frying pan's bottom to awaken all the attached flavour and reduce by half (about 3-4 minutes).
Add chicken broth, Dijon mustard and thick cream. Mix well to integrate. Incorporates minced stragon, lemon frying and juice.
Replace the prima onto the salsa, partially cover and let low heat cook for 10-12 minutes, till the chicken is completely cooked and juicy.
Adjust salt and pepper to taste. Decor with additional fresh stragon and some pink pepper berries if you wish. It's useful at once.

thai-basil-sauce-noodles-with-jammy-eggs.name: Thai Basil Sauce Noodles With Jammy Eggs

ingredients.item: Michiu tou or other rice wine
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: such as Hsin Tung Yang; about 8 oz.

ingredients.item: Store-bought fried garlic and chili crisp

instructions: If using eggs, bring a large pot of water to a boil over medium-high heat. Using a slotted spoon, carefully lower eggs into water one at a time. Cook 6½ minutes, adjusting heat to maintain a gentle boil. Transfer eggs to a bowl of ice water with slotted spoon; reserve pot with boiling water. Let eggs sit until just slightly warm, about 2 minutes.
Gently crack eggs all over and peel, starting from the wider end, which contains the air pocket. Slice in half and set aside for serving.
Blend raw garlic, Thai basil, and ½ cup oil in a blender or food processor until a smooth paste forms.

Heat remaining ¼ cup oil in a large skillet over medium. Carefully scrape in Thai basil purée and add wine, sugar, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Remove from heat and season with more salt if needed.

Return reserved pot of water to a boil. Cook garlic chives and bean sprouts until chives are bright green and sprouts start to turn translucent, about 1 minute. Using slotted spoon, transfer to a small bowl.
Cook noodles in same pot until al dente, about 5 minutes. Drain noodles and transfer to pan with sauce. Using tongs, toss noodles to coat.
Divide noodles among bowls. Top with bean sprouts, garlic chives, fried garlic, and reserved eggs (if using) and drizzle with chili crisp.

thai-chicken-curry.name: Thai Chicken Curry

ingredients.item: -oz. can or jar yellow curry paste

instructions: Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add curry paste and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add carrots, onion, and pepper and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is translucent, about 10 minutes.

Add potatoes, chicken, coconut milk, and 1½ cups water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, until chicken is cooked through and potatoes are tender, about 20 minutes. Divide curry among bowls and top with herbs.

thai-green-curry-with-sweet-potato-green.name: Thai Green Curry With Sweet Potato, Green Beans, And Chicken

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken breast, cut in 1” pieces

ingredients.item: Canned unsweetened coconut milk is sold at indian
ingredients.prep: Latin, and Southeast Asian markets and many supermarkets.

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion; cook, stirring often, until onion begins to soften, about 2 minutes. Add curry paste; stir for 1 minute. Whisk in coconut milk and 1 cup water. Add sweet potato and cook, uncovered, until sauce thickens to a creamy consistency, about 10 minutes. Stir in green beans, cover, and cook for 2 minutes. Fold chicken into mixture, cover, and cook until sweet potato is tender and chicken is just cooked through, about 4 minutes. Season with salt. Turn off heat and toss basil leaves, if using, into the curry.

the-ba-biscuit-mix.name: The Ba Biscuit Mix
instructions: Whisk all ingredients in a large bowl to combine.
DO AHEAD: Can be made 6 months ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

the-brussels-sprouts-special.name: The Brussels Sprouts Special

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Place pizza on a sheet pan or pizza pan. Do not allow to thaw before placing in the oven; it should be frozen.
Toss Brussels sprouts with 2 teaspoons olive oil in a medium bowl and season with salt and pepper. Scatter the Brussels sprouts on the pizza.
Toss the red onion slices with the remaining 1 teaspoon olive oil, and arrange on top of the Brussels sprouts.
Sprinkle the bacon over the onions, and top with grated Parmesan cheese and crushed red pepper flakes.
Bake in the preheated oven for 13 to 15 minutes.

the-italian-irishmans-pie.name: The Italian Irishman's Pie

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Grease a 2-quart casserole dish.

Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat; cook and stir Italian sausage until browned and crumbly, about 10 minutes. Use a slotted spoon to transfer sausage to prepared casserole dish. Drain drippings and reserve 2 tablespoons drippings in the skillet.
Melt 2 tablespoons margarine in a separate skillet over medium heat; cook and stir apple and onion slices until tender, about 8 minutes. Place apple and onion in casserole dish with sausage.
Lightly stir sausage, apple, and onion together; season with salt, black pepper, and oregano.
Brown flour in reserved drippings in skillet over medium heat. Whisk water into flour until thick gravy forms, about 3 minutes.
Pour gravy over sausage mixture in the casserole dish; spread mashed potatoes over the top with a spoon, creating peaks. Lightly brush mashed potatoes with 1 tablespoon melted margarine.
Bake in the preheated oven until the potatoes are lightly browned and the sausage mixture is bubbling, about 30 minutes.

the-quickest-red-wine-vinaigrette.name: The Quickest Red-wine Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions:
Combine ½ cup extra-virgin olive oil, ¼ cup red wine vinegar, 1 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 1 Tbsp. pure maple syrup, 1¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper, and ¼ tsp. garlic powder in a small glass jar or other container with a tight-fitting lid. Screw on lid or cover tightly and shake until emulsified.
Do ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 1 month ahead. Keep covered and chill.

the-slipway-crab-roll.name: The Slipway Crab Roll

ingredients.item: New england–style split-top hot dog buns

instructions: Gently mix crab and mayonnaise in a small bowl; season with salt.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Butter flat sides of buns and cook until golden, about 2 minutes per side. Fill each bun with lettuce, then crabmeat mixture; season with pepper.

tilapia-and-mashed-yams-with-pancetta-sa.name: Tilapia And Mashed Yams With Pancetta-sage Breadcrumbs
instructions: Sauté pancetta in large nonstick skillet over medium heat until crisp. Transfer to small bowl. Add breadcrumbs and 1 Tbsp. chopped sage to drippings in skillet; cook over medium-high heat, stirring, until breadcrumbs are almost crisp, 5 minutes. Transfer to bowl with pancetta. Cool; reserve skillet.

Place yams on plate and microwave on high until very soft, 5–8 minutes per side, depending on size of yam. Transfer yams to work surface. Cut yams in half lengthwise; scoop out pulp and place in medium glass bowl. Discard skin. Add remaining 1½ tsp. chopped sage and 1 Tbsp. butter to yams; mash until almost smooth. Season to taste with salt and freshly ground black pepper.

Sprinkle fish fillets with salt and freshly ground black pepper. Melt remaining 2 Tbsp. butter in same nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add fish fillets and cook until golden brown on outside and just opaque in center, 3–4 minutes per side.
If necessary, rewarm yams in microwave. Divide mashed yams among 4 plates. Top each serving with 1 fish fillet, sprinkle generously with pancetta-sage breadcrumbs, and serve.

tintas-double-pork-black-beans.name: Tinta’s Double-pork Black Beans

ingredients.prep: ribs and seeds removed, finely chopped

ingredients.item: . sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large saucepan over medium-high. Cook 6 oz. cured Spanish chorizo, chopped, and 4 oz. bacon (about 4 slices), chopped, stirring often, just until some fat has cooked out, about 5 minutes. Add 1 medium green bell pepper, ribs and seeds removed, finely chopped, 1 medium onion, finely chopped, 4 garlic cloves, finely chopped, 1 bay leaf, 1 Tbsp. dried oregano, 1 Tbsp. ground coriander, and 1 Tbsp. ground cumin. Cook, stirring often, until onion is beginning to soften, about 4 minutes.

Add 1 quart low-sodium chicken broth and two 15-oz. cans black beans and their liquid. Bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits stuck to bottom of pot with a wooden spoon. Reduce heat and simmer until liquid is slightly thickened and flavors have melded, 25–30 minutes. Stir in 1 Tbsp. sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar. Taste and season with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper if needed. Transfer to a large bowl.

tofu-lettuce-wraps-with-mushrooms.name: Tofu Lettuce Wraps With Mushrooms
instructions: Remove the tofu from its packaging and drain. Wrap the tofu in a kitchen towel, then place a heavy object on top of the tofu and press for 10–20 minutes, until the tofu feels more tender.

Make the sauce: In a medium bowl, combine the water, soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, ginger, sriracha, brown sugar, rice wine vinegar, and scallions and stir to dissolve the sugar. Set ½ cup (120 mL) of the sauce aside.
Crumble the pressed tofu into the remaining marinade, then cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.

Heat the sesame oil in a medium skillet or work over medium heat. Add the  onion and sauté for 3 minutes, until translucent. Add the mushrooms and cook for about 5 minutes, or until tender, then stir in the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.

Add the tofu and its marinade to the pan and cook until the majority of the liquid cooks off. Add the water chestnuts and scallions. Pour in three-quarters of the reserved sauce. Toss to coat the tofu and cook until just heated through. Transfer the tofu mixture to a medium bowl.

Heat the canola oil in the same pan over high heat until a drop of water sizzles when flicked onto the oil. Add the rice noodles and fry for about 30 seconds, until puffed up. Transfer the fried noodles to paper towels to drain.
Remove the core from the head of lettuce, then separate into individual leaves.
Serve the tofu in the lettuce cups and top with the crispy rice noodles and a drizzle of the remaining sauce.
Enjoy!

tomato-and-tomatillo-salad.name: Tomato And Tomatillo Salad

ingredients.prep: husks removed and rinsed, or green tomatoes, halved and cut into 1/4-inch half moons (see notes)
divided; for table salt use half as much by volume
room temperature, torn into large chunks

instructions: Place chopped tomatoes and tomatillos in a colander set over a large bowl and season with 3/4 teaspoon kosher salt. Toss to coat. Set aside at room temperature to drain, tossing occasionally until tomatoes release their juices, a minimum of 15 minutes and up to 1 hour.
Discard juice from bowl and transfer tomatoes to now-empty large bowl.

In a separate bowl, combine shallots and vinegar, and let sit for 5 minutes, stirring halfway through. Pour shallots through a fine-mesh strainer set over a medium bowl (don't discard vinegar). Transfer shallots to large bowl with tomatoes and set aside.
Add agave or honey, oregano, mustard, garlic, pepper, and remaining 3/4 teaspoon salt to bowl with vinegar; whisk until combined. Slowly whisk in olive oil until smooth and emulsified.
Add 1/4 cup of vinaigrette to bowl with tomatoes and shallots; toss to combine. Transfer to serving bowl or platter.
Top with burrata, almonds, and basil. Drizzle remaining vinaigrette evenly over salad. Finish with freshly ground pepper and flaky sea salt, if desired. Serve immediately.

tortilla-bowl-southwestern-salad.name: Tortilla Bowl Southwestern Salad
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C).
Pour the vegetable oil (1 teaspoon per bowl) into medium (1.2 quart) oven-proof bowls and rub around to coat the surface. Press each tortilla into a greased bowl.
Bake for about 10 minutes, until golden brown. Let the tortilla bowls cool.
Make 3 cuts lengthwise on each of the romaine hearts, remove the stems, and chop into smaller pieces. Rinse, drain, and place in a large salad bowl.
Dice the tomatoes and add them to the bowl with the romaine.
Dice the onion and add it to the salad.
Cut the avocados in half, remove the pits, and dice. Add to the salad.
Add the corn and black beans.
In a small bowl or liquid measuring cup, combine the olive oil, lime juice, garlic, cumin, red pepper flakes, cilantro, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss well.
Fill each tortilla bowl with the salad.
Enjoy!

traditional-colombian-cold-cuts-comedera.name: Traditional Colombian Cold Cuts
instructions: The onion and garlic and sodas will be taken and the ground flesh added and the salt and pepper will be sewed. Cook her till she reduces all the juice.
At the same frying pan, pour the choricas till they are doradito and clear out all the frying.
Take the choricas and get cold.
Cut the bananas into frying and cold. Take the potatoes and get them and make them a purée.
Similarly, fry the eggs but have the yolk a little soft, if you don't prefer them that way, cook them completely.
Clean the banana leaves with a moist cloth.

traditional-easter-bagel-recipe-comedera.name: Traditional Easter Bagel Recipe
traditional-easter-bagel-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de rosca de Pascua tradicional
instructions: Agrega 50 ml. agua y 13 gr. de levadura en un bowl grande y mezcla.
Add 2 eggs, 1 tablespoon of orange shell, 80 gr.of sugar, 250 gr. of force flour, 40 ml. olive oil at the above mix.
Revuelve todos los ingredientes hasta conseguir una masa consistente y uniforme.
Tapa y deja reposar por 20 minutos.
Vuelva la masa en una mesa con harina, amasa y da forma de circulo estilo doughnut.
Coloca un huevo cocido en el medio. Tapar y deja fermentar por 2 horas.
Una vez pase el tiempo, pinta con huevo toda la superficie.
Decorate with Sugar Noodles and border for 20 minutes at 180 ″.
Deja reposar y disfruta junto a tu familia.

traditional-mykonos-onion-pie-argiro.name: Traditional Mykonos Onion Pie

ingredients.item: 6 village leaves (or two traditional thick leaves)
1 kg of mycone firearms, (or fresh myzithra or anthrotyr or cheese mixture)
10 fresh onions (deep with their green leaves)
6 village leaves (or two traditional thick leaves)
1 kg of mycone firearms, (or fresh myzithra or anthrotyr or cheese mixture)
10 fresh onions (deep with their green leaves)

instructions: You can make your own peasant leaf.
They melt the cheeseball and the other cheeses with a fork in a bowl.
Add the herbs, salt and pepper and the broken pides.
We choose tenderly fresh onions.
If they're too big, use half.
We'll use their green leaves.
Finely chop the fresh and dry onions.
Add them to the cheese.
Beat the eggs with oil in a bowl and add them to the cheeses.
Mix the filling with a spoon.
If you have fresh fennel, you put it because it makes the pie magical.
Generally on the Aegean islands we use much fennel and fresh mint, especially on pies.
Otherwise, add a little more dill.
In an oily shallow baking pan of 40 million for pie, we lay three sheets radially oiling them in between.
Empty the filling and spread the ingredients with a spoon.
Turn the edges of the leaves that are prominent on the filling.
Cover the pie with the rest of the leaves.
Place them wrinkled and sprinkle olive oil between the leaves.
We drill the whole surface of the pie and make it surface.
Pour with the remaining olive oil and some water, sprinkle the surface.
Bake in a well preheated evening at 180 °C in the resistors (up and down) for about 1 hour, until the onion pie is browned up and down.
For a crisper result, I only bake for 20 minutes in the lower resistance.
I'm letting the pie stand for 15 minutes and draw its fluids. So the leaf will remain crispy until the last bite.

traditional-orange-chicken-pequerecetas.name: Traditional Orange Chicken
instructions: Ponemos aceite de oliva virgen extra en la cacerola y doramos las piezas de pollo salpimentadas a fuego vivo. Una vez doradas, los sacamos y reservamos.
In the same oil we put to polish both garlic teeth and two minced onions. When they are spotted we add the juice from the oranges.
Con la batidora trituramos todo hasta que quede una salsa suave.
We have some fine tirites from the orange skin that you can do with an acanalador or with a paddle
We add the chicken thighs and let them cook with soft heat about 20 or 30 minutes.
We serve once the chicken's been cooked and the sauce's been reduced.

trinity-korokke.name: Trinity Korokke

ingredients.prep: such as grapeseed, plus more as needed

instructions: Bring a large saucepan of water to a boil. Cook the potatoes for 10 minutes, or until tender. Add the celery, onion, and bell pepper and boil for 4 more minutes. The veggies will be lightly boiled but still have a crisp bite. Drain the contents of the pan, transfer to a large bowl, and mash the vegetable mixture together with a large spoon, ideally a slotted spoon or a potato masher. (The celery, onion, and bell pepper will retain their shape.) Add the salt and black pepper, then chill in the fridge for 15 minutes, or until cool enough to handle.
While the potato mixture is cooling, prepare your dredging station. In a shallow bowl, combine the flour and panko. In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, mayo, and milk.

Remove the potato mixture from the fridge and stir in the shredded mozzarella. Scoop out ¼-cup portions of the mixture and shape into discs. Dip each disc into the wet dredging mixture, then the dry mixture, ensuring each disc is evenly coated.

In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat until it is shimmering. Working in batches so as not to crowd the pan, fry the croquettes for 2 to 3 minutes on each side, until golden brown. Repeat this with the rest of the croquettes, adding more oil to the pan as needed so that the oil reaches halfway up the croquettes. Serve immediately with katsu sauce or ketchup for dipping, if desired.

triple-berry-cheesecake-poke-cake.name: Triple Berry Cheesecake Poke Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Coat a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray; line with parchment paper.

Combine cake mix, 1 cup water, eggs, and vegetable oil in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment; beat on low speed for 30 seconds. Increase speed to medium; beat for 2 minutes. Pour batter into the prepared dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until cake is golden brown, about 25 minutes. Cool at room temperature for 10 minutes. Keep oven on.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Combine graham cracker crumbs and melted butter in a bowl; spread evenly onto the prepared baking sheet.
Bake until slightly golden, about 10 minutes. Cool to room temperature; store crumbs in an airtight container.

Meanwhile, combine strawberries, blackberries, raspberries, sugar, 1/3 cup water, and 2 tablespoons lemon juice in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer, stirring occasionally, until fruit is very soft, 7 to 8 minutes. Mash berries together with a fork; cool for 5 minutes.

Poke 30 holes (5 rows of 6 holes each) into cake using the handle of a wooden spoon. Drizzle 1/3 cup sweetened condensed milk over entire cake; pour berry mixture over cake, spreading using a spatula, ensuring mixture goes into holes. Cover cake; refrigerate at least 1 hour.

Place cream cheese in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment; whisk on high speed until very smooth, at least 3 minutes. Add remaining sweetened condensed milk, 1/4 cup lemon juice, and salt; whisk for 1 minute. Spread cream cheese mixture over cooled cake. Cover cake; chill 3 hours to overnight.
Cut cake into 12 large pieces; top with graham cracker crumbs.

tuna-carnitas.name: Tuna Carnitas

ingredients.item: Plus 2 tsp. diamond crystal or 2 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt
Vegetable oil; plus more for frying fish

ingredients.prep:
warmed tortillas, and lime wedges (for
serving)

instructions: Toast 3 morita chiles, stems removed, in a medium Dutch oven over medium heat, turning occasionally, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add 1 medium tomato, halved, 1 medium yellow onion, halved, 10 garlic cloves, smashed, 1 lb. dried pinto beans, and 1 avocado leaf (if using); pour in water to cover by at least 2". Increase heat to high and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer gently, adding water as needed to keep beans submerged, 1½ hours.

Add 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt and continue to cook until beans are tender, 45–60 minutes. Remove avocado leaf; discard. Drain beans through a mesh sieve set over a medium bowl; set bean cooking liquid aside. Return beans and solids to pot.

Meanwhile, cook 8 oz. bacon, coarsely chopped, in a large cast-iron skillet over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until browned and very crisp, about 20 minutes. Transfer bacon to a small bowl with a slotted spoon, leaving fat behind. Set skillet with fat aside.

Place 1 medium red onion, thinly sliced, in a small heatproof bowl. Bring 1 Tbsp. sugar, 1 cup distilled white vinegar, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ cup water to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium, then pour over red onion and set aside to pickle.

Add bacon, 1 tsp. dried oregano, 1 tsp. garlic powder, 1 tsp. ground coriander, 1 tsp. smoked paprika, 2 cups reserved bean cooking liquid, and remaining 3 Tbsp. distilled white vinegar to pot with bean mixture. Using an immersion blender, blend until smooth. Season bean mixture with more salt if needed. (Alternatively, you can blend in batches in a regular blender.)

Pour 1 cup vegetable oil into another medium Dutch oven or heavy pot (it should come about ½" up sides); fit with thermometer and heat over medium-high. Add bean mixture and cook, stirring and scraping bottom and sides of pot with a heatproof rubber spatula, until homogeneous and emulsified, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat; cover with plastic wrap, pressing directly onto surface (this will prevent a skin from forming).

Season 1 lb. tuna steaks, patted dry, cut into 1" pieces, with salt, then place in a medium bowl. Add ¼ cup (45 g) rice flour or cornstarch; toss to coat. Pour fresh oil into reserved skillet with fat to come 1" up sides. Fit with thermometer and heat until thermometer registers about 400°. Working in batches, cook tuna, tossing constantly, until lightly crisped on the outside but still a little pink in the center, about 30 seconds per batch. Transfer to a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt.
Scoop beans onto plates and smooth into an even layer; top with tuna, drained pickled onion, and microgreens or cilantro. Serve with warmed tortillas and lime wedges.

tuna-patties-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Patties
instructions: Escorra bem o atum e triture-o. Limpe o pimento e corte-o em cubos pequenos. Descasque e pique a cebola e os dentes de alho. Leve ao lume uma frigideira com o azeite, a cebola e os alhos e deixe refogar. Acrescente o pimento e mexa.
Adicione depois o atum, a salsa picada, sal e pimenta e, por fim, junte as natas. Envolva bem, deixe fervilhar e retire do lume.

Prepare the dough: light a pot with milk and equal amount of water. Add some salt and butter, and when you start boiling, pour the flour at once. Move well and remove from the fire when the dough begins to drop from the pot. Transfer to the floured counter and knead as cooled. Form a ball and let it rest for about 5 minutes.

Stretch the mass to get a rectangle. Distribute into the mass of the tuna filling, roughly in half. Fold the dough, plug the stuffing, and cut with a cutter. Gently press the ends with your fingers, pass through the beaten eggs and then by grated bread. Fry the rissols in hot oil until they gain color, remove and pour on absorbent paper. Serve them hot or cold with chicory salad and cherry tomatoes.

tuna-a-bras-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Bras

ingredients.item: Q.b. salt and ground black pepper

instructions: Coloque o atum a escorrer num passador de rede. Descasque as cebolas e os alhos, corte as cebolas em meias-luas finas e pique os alhos finamente. Coloque a cebola e os alhos num tacho, junte o azeite, tempere com sal, leve ao lume e deixe refogar, durante cerca de 15 minutos.

Add the drained tuna, wrap well and let cook for 1 minute. Add about 2/3 of the straw potato and let it cook, stirring, for another 1 minute. In a bowl, slightly beat the eggs with yolks and finely chopped parsley, season with a little salt and pepper, add to the pot, wrap well and let cook, stirring always, until the eggs are cooked and creamy to taste.
Retire do lume, junte a restante batata-palha e as azeitonas laminadas e envolva. Sirva decorado com um raminho de salsa.

turkey-meat-recipe-with-leek-and-cream-s.name: Turkey Meat Recipe With Leek And Cream Sauce
turkey-meat-recipe-with-leek-and-cream-s.original_name: Pırasa And Creamy Sauce Cake Meat Recipe

turkey-pasta-sauce.name: Turkey Pasta Sauce

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and a pinch of salt; cook and stir until softened, about 5 minutes. Add turkey; cook and stir until browned, about 5 minutes. Stir in garlic; cook for 2 minutes. Add red pepper flakes.

Stir tomatoes, white wine, tomato paste, oregano, and basil into the pot. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until the raw wine flavor cooks off, about 1 hour. Stir in sugar to reduce acidity. Season with salt and pepper. Puree sauce with an immersion blender for a less chunky sauce.

turkish-coffee-truffle-recipe-lezzet.name: Turkish Coffee Truffle Recipe

Instead of normal cream you can use 35%–40 oily liquid cream or coconut cream;it creates a vegan option.

Kakao, coffee and teal; outside of the plant; powder nuts, powder antep nuts, coconut or turç by spreading the visual life add both taste &diness.

2. To add rk coffee and mix it in jealous fire up to 1 minute, let the coffee aroma deerç to the cream.

10. Find your desired coating materials: cocoa, Turkish coffee or reindeed chocolate.
11. 11. 11. 11. Truffle's in the refrigerator short time Store and wealth 5–10 minutes at room temperature while serving.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

turkish-lamb-kebabs.name: Turkish Lamb Kebabs

ingredients.item: Sea salt and finely ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: trimmed of most of the fat and cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) chunks

instructions: Mix together the garlic, olive oil, tomato paste, spices, thyme, and salt and pepper to taste.
Add the meat to the marinade and toss. Let marinate for at least 2 hours.
Prepare a charcoal fire in an outdoor grill, switch on the gas if you have an outdoor gas grill, or preheat the broiler to high.

Thread the meat onto 7 long skewers and the tomatoes onto an eighth one. Grill over high heat or broil 3 to 4 minutes on each side, or until the meat and tomatoes are done to your liking. Slip the meat and tomatoes off the skewers onto flatbread and serve immediately.

4th-of-july-fruit-salad.name: 4th Of July Fruit Salad
instructions: Combine cantaloupe, watermelon, blueberries, and strawberries in a large bowl; stir well.
